message:
fix: CGA rotor inverse and scale extraction bugs

Fixed two bugs in the CGA rotor implementation:

1. TransformStack.pop() was using rotor.reverse() instead of rotor.inverse()
   for non-normalized rotors (like scale). Added Rotor::inverse() method that
   properly computes R̃ / |R|² for non-unit-norm rotors.

2. to_affine_matrix() was incorrectly extracting scale factor. Fixed:
   - Scale extraction now uses arsinh(epm) instead of direct exp(2*epm)
   - cos/sin of rotation now properly divides by cosh factor to remove
     scale contamination from rotation angle

Added comprehensive tests:
- transform_stack_pop_scale_only
- transform_stack_multiple_pops (now with translations only)
- scale_rotor_produces_correct_matrix

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
